emails.subject: Re: Anjam
emails.body: Re: Anjam Dale I shall try to close the loop today or tomorrow. I have already mentioned this to Anjam. Vince Dale Surbey 08/01/2000 09:22 AM

emails.subject: Anjam
emails.body: Vince, Let me know when you've talked to Anjam about moving to Houston. I need to do his performance review this week and it would be good to get this on the table with him before then. Thanks Dale
